articles.author: Andrew Beaton, Joshua Robinson
articles.title: Belgium Ends Team USA’s World Cup Run After Political Firestorm - WSJ
articles.description: Folarin Balogun returned to the lineup after an intervention by President Trump. But he couldn’t carry the Americans to their first quarterfinal since 2002 as the U.S. slumped to a 4-1 defeat.
articles.content: SEATTLEThe U.S. national team came into this World Cup with every conceivable home advantage. The Americans enjoyed automatic qualification and a gentle group as co-hosts. They encountered raucous, s… [+440 chars]
